name: Style Note Plugin
description: Stores an extra style note and injects it into the prompt pipeline.

commands.name: style-note-set
commands.description: Set the extra style note for prompt injection.

options.name: note
options.description: The note content to inject before the model call.

commands.name: style-note-show
commands.description: Show the currently stored style note.

commands.name: style-note-clear
commands.description: Clear the currently stored style note.
